functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Green Jellyfish Guide
pages:
Green Jellyfish Guide

A Choascraft guide for green jellyfish facts, hazards, parts, and jellyfish gear.

Fact 1

Jellyfish are soft-bodied animals with no bones, brain, or heart.

Fact 2

Most jellyfish drift with currents, but they can pulse their bell to move through water.

Fact 3

Their tentacles can carry stinging cells used for defense and catching prey.

Fact 4

Some jellyfish can gather in blooms when food, currents, and water conditions line up.

Fact 5

Jellyfish are mostly water, which helps them float and move with little weight.

Fact 6

Many ocean animals eat jellyfish, including sea turtles, fish, and other jellyfish.

Choascraft Green Jellyfish

Green jellyfish are one of the jellyfish variants chosen by the master jellyfish spawner.

Hazard

Jellyfish hurt nearby non-jellyfish mobs with area damage. Give them room in the water.

Movement

Jellyfish swim, wander, idle, avoid threats, and flock with other water mobs.

Parts

Jellyfish parts are used for colored jellyfish armor. Green gear uses Green Jelly.

Rare Parts

Jelly Pearl and Jelly Cyst are important rare parts for stronger jellyfish equipment.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
J = matching Jelly
P = Jelly Pearl
C = Jelly Cyst

Helmet

Pattern:
III
IJI
JPJ

Result: matching Jellyfish Helmet

IJI

Netherite

Use a smithing table with jellyfish armor and a netherite ingot to upgrade it.

Diver Note

Green jellyfish mark the water like lanterns. Keep watching the tentacles.
